subject: Robustness principle / Postel's law — IETF Discussion Corpus (ietf110-ietf123)

attachments.body: {"principle_id": "robustness", "name": "Robustness principle / Postel's law", "description": "Be conservative in what you send, be liberal in what you accept.", "rfc_refs": ["RFC 761", "RFC 1122", "RFC 9413"]}
